title: YTP- Torchwood alternate intro
description:
Download mp3 http://www.megaupload.com/?d=9YSF9S17
Torchwood mixed with the A-team theme played to the sound of Jack Harkness resurrecting? It's just what you always wanted, correct? I got the idea for this after watching my friend's Torchwood poop http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XnCCh5dj8VY
